scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-core run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-github run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-opencode run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube run build && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-github run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-opencode run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube run typecheck && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run typecheck
scripts.test: node --test "test/*.test.mjs" && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-core test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-github test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-opencode test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube test && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality test
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-core run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-github run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-adapter-opencode run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu run release:check && pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube run verify && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run build && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality test && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run test:publish-readiness
scripts.verify:aiq: pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run build && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality test && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run test:publish-readiness && pnpm --filter ai-code-quality run bench:ci
